note: Specificity contract for the validation protocol. Calibrated on synthetic data, then frozen. Never adjusted to match real-data outcomes.

objectives.description: On the fixed benchmark set: stable and placebo false-positive rates must be <= 20%. Test detection rate must be >= 80%.

contrast_criterion.description: Detection requires relative contrast: test score must exceed stable/placebo scores by a margin. This replaces absolute detection and prevents 'detects everywhere' failures.
contrast_criterion.rule: score_test >= quantile(test_scores, Q_test) AND score_test - max(score_stable, score_placebo) >= margin

calibration_grid.description: Pre-defined grid searched on synthetic data to select (margin, Q_test). Frozen after calibration.

anti_cherry_picking.benchmark_set: Fixed inputs defined in contracts/VALIDATION_BENCHMARK.json. Evaluated on the full set, never on a subset.
anti_cherry_picking.description: Adding a new input to the benchmark requires a versioned contract update.
